info.name: NY Edit Flow (Add/edit/remove Stops + Destination)
info.description: End-to-end mid-ride edit flow: fresh driver + rider -> onboard -> search (no stops) -> auto-assign -> start ride -> editStops adds 2 stops -> editDestination changes drop -> editStops removes tail stop (preservedPrefixStops=1, stops=[]) -> end ride. Three sequential edits on the same booking; all must succeed because the Rider:Edit:BId-<id> lock releases between handlers and expirePendingSoftBURs only sweeps SOFT BURs (not DRIVER_ACCEPTED ones).

exec: var regNo = "KA" + String(Math.floor(10 + Math.random() * 89)) + String.fromCharCode(65 + Math.floor(Math.random() * 26)) + String.fromCharCode(65 + Math.floor(Math.random() * 26)) + String(Math.floor(1000 + Math.random() * 8999));
const start = Date.now(); while (Date.now() - start < delay) {}
pm.test('Status code is 200', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(200); }); console.log('Ride started');
// Wait at least 3s: lets the rider-side cooldown expire AND gives BPP time to compute fare and dispatch on_update.

pm.test('BUR status is SOFT before confirm', function () { pm.expect(details.status).to.equal('SOFT'); });

var s = Date.now(); while (Date.now() - s < 1200) {} grabBpp(1);
// BPP BUR id (stopsAddBppBurId) was captured in 'Rider Confirm Add Stops' (post-confirm).
// Small settle wait before the driver-accept.

pm.test('Captured BPP BUR id from FCM overlay', function () { pm.expect(pm.environment.get('stopsAddBppBurId'), 'no DRIVER_NOTIFY_LOCATION_UPDATE overlay in mock-server — was CONFIRM_UPDATE fired / is fcm_url pointed at 8080/fcm?').to.be.a('string').and.not.empty; });
pm.test('Status 200 (driver accepted add-stops edit)', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(200); });
// Wait for BPP postEditResult ACCEPT -> on_update CONFIRM_UPDATE back to BAP -> BAP BUR status flips SOFT to CONFIRM.
pm.test('BAP BUR transitioned SOFT -> CONFIRM after driver accept', function () { pm.expect(details.status).to.equal('CONFIRM'); });
console.log('Rider stops count:', stops.length, 'hasStops not separately exposed but stops list non-empty implies booking.hasStops=true');
pm.test('Stops list non-empty implies booking.hasStops flag was set to true (transformer gates stops list by hasStops==true)', function () { pm.expect(stops.length).to.be.above(0); });
// Capture stop ids for later phases (Phase F stop-visited)
if (stops.length >= 1 && stops[0].id) { pm.environment.set('stop1Id', stops[0].id); console.log('stop1Id:', stops[0].id); }
if (stops.length >= 2 && stops[1].id) { pm.environment.set('stop2Id', stops[1].id); console.log('stop2Id:', stops[1].id); }
// Phase C: regression guard for sweep + confirm-by-burId. SOFT_X is created first, then SOFT_Y supersedes it via the createdAt-based sweep.
pm.test('SOFT_X fare populated (BPP processed it)', function () { pm.expect(details.estimatedFare).to.not.be.null; });
pm.test('SOFT_X status still SOFT (not yet confirmed/swept)', function () { pm.expect(details.status).to.equal('SOFT'); });

item.name: Rider Confirm SOFT_X (→ USER_CONFIRMED, capture BPP id from overlay)

exec: // Clear the FCM store so X's CONFIRM_UPDATE overlay is the only one present when we read.
// (Python mock-server FCM accumulates and never drains; clearing makes the capture deterministic.)
// Manual mode: CONFIRM_UPDATE (Update.hs:415/545) fired sendUpdateLocOverlay for X carrying
// X's BPP BUR id. Capture it NOW — before SOFT_Y is confirmed (Y's overlay would then be newest).
pm.sendRequest({ url: pm.environment.get('mock_fcm_base') + '/read/test-device', method: 'GET' }, function (err, res) {
if (!err && res) { try { var p = res.json(); if (Array.isArray(p)) msgs = p; } catch (e) {} }
if (pm.response.code === 200) { var s = Date.now(); while (Date.now() - s < 1200) {} grabX(1); }

item.name: Rider editStops SOFT_Y (active, supersedes X on confirm)

exec: // Cooldown from SOFT_X has been released by /on_update SOFT (race-guard semantics).
// Two SOFTs can coexist as BUR rows; supersede happens at CONFIRM time, not on SOFT creation.
pm.test('Status 200 (SOFT_Y accepted after on_update released cooldown)', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(200); });
pm.test('SOFT_Y captured for later confirm/supersede assertion', function () { pm.expect(d.bookingUpdateRequestId).to.be.a('string').and.not.empty; });
// Clear FCM so SOFT_Y's CONFIRM_UPDATE overlay is the only one we read.

pm.sendRequest({ url: pm.environment.get('mock_fcm_base') + '/read/test-device', method: 'GET' }, function (err, res) {

var s = Date.now(); while (Date.now() - s < 1200) {} grabBpp(1);
// Wait for supersede DB write + BAP on_update EDIT_SUPERSEDED to land.
// Note: BAP does not transition BUR status on supersede — only sets errorObj.
// BPP-side BUR is EXPIRED; BAP-side BUR stays SOFT but carries the EDIT_SUPERSEDED errorObj.
pm.test('SOFT_X errorObj.errorCode = EDIT_SUPERSEDED (supersede signal from BPP)', function () {

item.name: Rider editStops BUR_Z (after BUR_Y confirm, before BUR_Y accept)

exec: // Manual mode (editLocDriverPermissionNeeded=true): BUR_Y is USER_CONFIRMED awaiting driver-accept.
// In that window the rider can still create another SOFT (BUR_Z). When driver-accepts BUR_Y next,
// supersede will mark BUR_Z as EXPIRED (= expired by d2).
pm.test('Status 200 (BUR_Z created as SOFT)', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(200); });

item.name: Rider Edit Destination SOFT (will be rejected)

// Clear FCM so this confirm's CONFIRM_UPDATE overlay is the only one we read.
// Capture the reject BUR's BPP id from its overlay — only if confirm succeeded.

if (!err && res) { try { var p = res.json(); if (Array.isArray(p)) msgs = p; } catch (e) {} }
} else if (attempt < 8) { var t0 = Date.now(); while (Date.now() - t0 < 250) {} grabBpp(attempt + 1); }
var s = Date.now(); while (Date.now() - s < 1200) {} grabBpp(1);

item.name: Verify Booking toLocation UNCHANGED After Reject

exec: pm.test('toLocation still equals Phase D dest (driver-reject did NOT half-apply)', function () {

item.name: Verify Ride toLocation UNCHANGED After Reject (Driver)

exec: // Capture BPP-side stop ids from driver ride data. The arrived/{stopId}/stop endpoint expects BPP location id, not BAP's.
if (s1LocId) { pm.environment.set('stop1Id', s1LocId); console.log('BPP stop1Id:', s1LocId); }
if (s2LocId) { pm.environment.set('stop2Id', s2LocId); console.log('BPP stop2Id:', s2LocId); }
pm.test('Driver-side toLocation still equals Phase D dest', function () {
// Phase J: race between driver-arrives-at-stop and rider-edits-stops.
// At this point no stop has been visited, so the BPP SOFT-entry guard (reachedStopIndices > n) passes.
// We will then trigger 'Driver Arrived at Stop 1' BEFORE confirming this BUR, opening the race window.
// On confirm we expect BPP handleStopsModification CONFIRM_UPDATE branch to re-check reachedStopIndices and return 400.
pm.test('Status 200 (SOFT entered before any stop visited)', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(200); });
pm.test('estimatedFare populated (SOFT processed by BPP)', function () { pm.expect(details.estimatedFare).to.not.be.null; });
// Phase F: realistic mid-ride. Driver actually visits stop 1; later we edit stops with preservedPrefixStops>=1 (preserving the visited stop).
// stop1Id was captured during Phase C 'Verify Booking Reflects SOFT_Y Stops'.
// This call ALSO opens the race window for Phase J: raceBurId is SOFT, and reachedStopIndices is about to become [1].
// Phase J assertion. The raceBurId SOFT was created BEFORE the driver arrived at stop 1.
// Now reachedStopIndices=[1] but the SOFT's preservedPrefixStops=0. The BPP CONFIRM_UPDATE
// re-check 'when (any (> n) reachedStopIndices)' must fire and return a 400 (or upstream 500 wrapping the error).
// If this step returns 200 it means the guard is only at SOFT-entry, not at confirm time — a real race-window bug.
pm.test('Race confirm rejected (non-200) -> race window is closed', function () {
pm.test('Response body is an error payload (BPP rejection bubbled up)', function () {
var stale = body.indexOf('stale') >= 0 || body.indexOf('already reached') >= 0 || body.indexOf('has been reached') >= 0 || body.indexOf('cannot modify') >= 0 || body.indexOf('in flight') >= 0;
// Accept BECKN_API_CALL_ERROR too in case the safeCatch in postEditResultConfirm isn't deployed yet.
pm.expect(stale || generic, 'expected stale/race-detected error, got: ' + pm.response.text().slice(0, 300)).to.be.true;

item.name: Rider editStops preserve stop 1 + add new stop X

// BPP fork (route compute + sendUpdateEditDest) can take a while on a loaded local env. Wait long enough for on_update to land.
// Clear FCM so this confirm's CONFIRM_UPDATE overlay is the only one we read.
// Capture post-visit edit BUR's BPP id from its overlay — only if confirm succeeded.
pm.sendRequest({ url: pm.environment.get('mock_fcm_base') + '/read/test-device', method: 'GET' }, function (err, res) {
if (!err && res) { try { var p = res.json(); if (Array.isArray(p)) msgs = p; } catch (e) {} }
} else if (attempt < 8) { var t0 = Date.now(); while (Date.now() - t0 < 250) {} grabBpp(attempt + 1); }
var s = Date.now(); while (Date.now() - s < 1200) {} grabBpp(1);
// Manual mode: booking.stops only mutates after driver-accept (postEditResultInner ACCEPT branch).
pm.test('Status 200 (driver accepted post-visit edit)', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(200); });

item.name: Rider editStops drop visited stop (Stale-state Negative)

exec: // Phase G: try to drop the already-visited stop. BPP's reachedStopIndices>n guard should reject with 400.
pm.test('Error mentions already reached stops', function () {
// Phase H: remove tail stop, preserving the visited stop 1. After Phase G's 400 there's no cooldown to wait for (rejected request doesn't engage the lock), but be safe with 3s anyway.

} else if (attempt < 8) { var t0 = Date.now(); while (Date.now() - t0 < 250) {} grabBpp(attempt + 1); }
var s = Date.now(); while (Date.now() - s < 1200) {} grabBpp(1);
// Manual mode: tail-stop removal only commits to booking.stops after driver-accept.

pm.test('Rider now sees 1 stop', function () { pm.expect(stops.length).to.equal(1); });
pm.test('Stops list non-empty implies booking.hasStops still true (1 stop remains)', function () { pm.expect(stops.length).to.be.above(0); });
pm.test('Surviving stop is the visited stop 1', function () {
pm.test('Driver now sees 1 stop', function () { pm.expect(stops.length).to.equal(1); });
pm.test('Status code is 200', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(200); }); console.log('Ride ended');
// We requested isActive=false, so the freshly-completed ride should appear here.
if (!ride) { console.log('driver_ride_id not found in inactive list; first id:', list[0] && list[0].id); }
pm.test('Driver ride status COMPLETED', function () { pm.expect(ride).to.exist; pm.expect(ride.status).to.equal('COMPLETED'); });
